buff.rebirth_i.effect: When dying, recover 50% of max life and consume 1 stack.
buff.damage_immune.effect: When taking damage, reduce it to 0 and consume 1 stack.
buff.vulnerable.effect: When attacked, take 50% more damage and consume 1 stack.
buff.fear.effect: When using an attack skill, take damage equal to its stacks.
buff.taunt.effect: Enemies can only target this unit; consume 1 stack when taking damage.
buff.thorn.effect: When attacked, deal damage equal to its stacks to the attacker.
buff.stun.effect: The next skill is prevented and you lose 1 Energy; consume 1 stack after triggering.
buff.pursuit.effect: At turn end, deal damage once.
buff.debuff_immunity.effect: Negate 1 debuff application and consume 1 stack.
buff.invisible.effect: Cannot be targeted while other characters are alive; consume 1 stack at turn start.
buff.swift.effect: At turn start, draw 1 card per stack.
buff.extra_power.effect: When gaining Power, gain extra Power equal to its stacks.
buff.extra_survivability.effect: When gaining Survivability, gain extra Survivability equal to its stacks.
buff.extra_turn.effect: At turn end, consume 1 stack and gain 1 full extra turn.
buff.auto_armor.effect: After being attacked, gain Block equal to its stacks.
buff.barricade.effect: At turn start, retain your Block.
buff.afterimage.effect: At turn start, Block does not disappear and this loses 1 stack.
buff.weaken.effect: Deal 25% less damage; consume 1 stack after each attack.
buff.disaster.effect: Each round, take damage equal to its stacks and consume 1 stack.
buff.divinity.effect: Attack damage is doubled; consume 1 stack at turn start.
buff.shadow.effect: When attacking, gain Power equal to its stacks.
buff.demon.effect: At turn end, gain Power equal to its stacks.
buff.void.effect: When other allies end their turns, gain Power equal to its stacks.
buff.echo.effect: Each turn, the first X skill cards are cast twice, where X equals its stacks.
buff.sanctuary.effect: When an ally ends their turn, recover 0 life a number of times equal to its stacks.
buff.extra_draw.effect: At turn start, draw 1 extra card per stack and consume 1 stack.
buff.source.effect: At turn start, gain 1 Energy per stack.
buff.energy_storage.effect: At turn end, lose 1 less Energy per stack.
buff.eternal_dark.effect: At turn start, gain 1 stack of Invisible per stack.
buff.beacon.effect: When gaining Block, other allies gain one third of the Block gained.
buff.curse_power.effect: Whenever attacking, apply Weaken to the target equal to its stacks.
buff.weakening_field.effect: For each stack of Weaken you apply, all allies gain 3 Block.
skill.step.target.each_row_first: the first character in each row
skill.step.target.each_row_last: the last character in each row
skill.step.target.each_col_first: the first character in each column
skill.step.target.each_col_last: the last character in each column
skill.step.target.find_empty_slot_after: find an empty slot starting {count} positions behind self
skill.step.target.find_empty_slot_before: find an empty slot starting {count} positions ahead of self
skill.step.loop.invalid: Invalid loop condition; does not execute.
skill.step.loop.energy_cost: Repeat once per {cost} Energy paid for this skill:
skill.extract.text.total_weaken_energy: Gain Energy equal to the total {buff} stacks on all enemies.
skill.reverb_chain.text.loop_by_allied_a: Repeat X times, where X is the total action count of your other allies this battle.
skill.charge.text.block_from_damage_and_: Gain Block equal to the damage dealt this time plus {survivability}.
skill.vulnerability_conversion.text.tota: Gain Power equal to the total {buff} stacks on all enemy characters.
skill.brightest_moment.text.lose_invisib: Lose all Invisible stacks. For each stack lost, all allies gain 2 Survivability.
skill.plague_status.name: Plague
skill.plague_status.desc.turn_end_damage: At turn end, if in hand: take {amount} damage.
character.echo.name: Echo
character.echo.passive.name: Resonance
character.echo.passive.upgrade: Passive upgrade: gain 1 extra Energy at the start of the first turn.
character.kasiya.name: Kasiya
character.kasiya.passive.name: Battle Spirit
character.kasiya.passive.description: When another ally uses an Attack skill: recover {heal} base Life.
character.mariya.name: Mariya
character.mariya.passive.name: Healing
character.mariya.passive.description: At turn end: restore {heal} base Life to the ally with the lowest Life.
character.nightingale.name: Nightingale
character.nightingale.passive.name: Nightglow
character.nightingale.passive.descriptio: When an ally ends their turn: pursue once and deal damage equal to {power}.

keyword.exhaust.effect: After use, remove this from the battle.
keyword.voidness.effect: If this is in your hand at end of turn, Exhaust it.
keyword.carry.effect: Play 1 random card from the target's draw or discard pile without spending Energy.

ui.debug_console.subtitle: Add skills, equipment, relics, items, or adjust character stats. Type help for commands. Use ~ / ESC to close.
ui.debug_console.placeholder: Example: addskill Nightingale BreakStrike  or  setstat Echo power 20
ui.debug_console.ready: Debug console ready. Press ~ or the gear button to open it.
